title: trochocephalus pectinatus
intro: Trochocephalus pectinatus, also known as the "Screw Pine", is a type of plant that belongs to the family Pandanaceae. The medicinal properties of Trochocephalus pectinatus include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Trochocephalus pectinatus include its leaves and young shoots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, and are often used in traditional medicine.
